description.ko: 충돌하는 흑백 셔터와 파편화된 글리치가 정밀한 기하학적 균형으로 고정되는 고속 터미널.
description.en: A high-speed monochrome terminal of fractured shutters, where opposing glitches lock into exact geometric balance.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Moire Interrupt Terminal": a severe black and white geometric glitch abstraction built as a borderless field of colliding moire shutters and fractured parity windows, with no character, logo, typography, sculpture, sphere, cube, monolith, or singular hero object. Matte #1A1A1A angular shutter plates cross hard #FFFFFF optical breaks, while #808080 and #C0C0C0 slivered facets form offset lozenges, split triangular apertures, clipped X-joints, narrow saw-cut diagonals, and staggered square registers. The composition feels like a monochrome display terminal refreshing faster than its geometry can stabilize: vertical slit-scan bands buckle sideways, micro-checker fragments snap out of phase, and sharp polygonal seams collide in opposing directions while preserving exact fragmented balance. Dense horizontal scanlines, moire interference, luma tearing, grayscale jitter, bit-crushed rectangular scars, broken sync ticks, and medium-density square particle debris create intense monochrome complexity. High contrast, crisp vector edges, sharp angles, cold mechanical depth, fast motion, chaos within order, perfect balance created by fragments.
